settings.hideWhenUnavailable.label: Hide when unavailable
settings.hideWhenUnavailable.desc: Hide the widget entirely when Squeekboard is not running
settings.disableHoverIcon.label: Disable hover icon
settings.disableHoverIcon.desc: Always show the current state icon instead of a hover icon. Note: hover icons only appear when the bar is at the top or bottom.
settings.recheck.label: Recheck state
